title: Podman artifacts do not contain a createdat date?
body:
### Feature request description

I would like to be able inspect an artifact and figure out when it was created?

### Suggest potential solution

Add a createdat field to the manifest.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Only thing I can assume is the EPOCH.  


### Additional context

RamaLama lists models along with the date they were created, this gives users an idea how fresh the model is.
